DOWNED TREES DAMAGED NUMEROUS HOMES, OF WHICH AT LEAST 6 TO 7 HOMES WERE DESTROYED. NUMEROUS OUTBUILDINGS AND VEHICLES WERE ALSO SEVERELY DAMAGED OR DESTROYED.
